name: Quiz Scoring Script
Quiz Question Naming Series
script:
name = (doc.question or "")[:50].strip()

if frappe.db.exists("Quiz Question", name):
    name = name + "-" + frappe.utils.random_string(4)

doc.id = name

name: Quiz Naming Series
script:
name = (doc.quiz_title or "")[:50].strip()

if frappe.db.exists("Quiz", name):
    name = name + "-" + frappe.utils.random_string(4)

doc.id = name
